concept_decisions.labels_compared: spatial_transmission_models vs metapopulation_models vs phylogeography_genomic_diffusion vs sexual_health_access_intervention_programs vs critical_transition_early_warning_signals
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest; conflict titles and complete available abstracts; allowed concepts table; source concept table.
concept_decisions.rationale: This catchall remains useful, but these conflicts separate into metapopulation spread, phylogeographic diffusion, a sexual-health intervention, and an epidemic-transition early-warning study.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest; allowed concepts table; source concept table; no conflict-input rows carried this label.
concept_decisions.rationale: Self-exciting spatiotemporal point processes remain a distinct method family and this batch provides no basis to merge or rename them.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: spatial_diffusion_models vs reaction_diffusion_epidemic_models vs empirical_spatial_diffusion_analyses vs gravity_radiation_mobility_models
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest; conflict titles and complete available abstracts; allowed concepts table; source concept table.
concept_decisions.rationale: These records divide into mechanistic reaction-diffusion models, empirical spatial-spread analyses, and one mobility-structured diffusion analysis.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest; conflict titles and complete available abstracts; allowed concepts table; source concept table.
concept_decisions.rationale: True geostatistical work remains distinct, but two records are phylodynamic genealogy methods rather than spatial regression or geostatistics.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest; conflict titles and complete available abstracts; allowed concepts table; source concept table.
concept_decisions.rationale: A generic changepoint concept is still needed, but the set also contains a threshold/segmented-regression subgroup and an epidemic-model subgroup with transmission-phase changepoints.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest; conflict titles and complete available abstracts; allowed concepts table; source concept table.
concept_decisions.rationale: These conflicts separate into HIV drug-resistance EWIs, critical-transition early-warning signals, and clinical deterioration scores or biomarkers.
